interestingMax.interestingReason: Maximum minority-effective districts from VRA-constrained ensemble

interestingMin.interestingReason: Minimum minority-effective districts from race-blind ensemble

interestingCompact.interestingReason: Most geographically compact plan (fewest split boundaries) from race-blind ensemble

interestingMax.label: Max Minority Opportunity Plan
interestingMax.characteristics: Maximizes the number of majority-minority districts (>=50% Black)

interestingMin.label: Minimum Effectiveness Plan
interestingMin.characteristics: Fewest minority-effective districts — race-blind baseline for contrast

interestingCompact.label: Most Compact Plan
interestingCompact.characteristics: Fewest geographic splits — most contiguous district boundaries
